author: f1troll

caption:
In the first INDYCAR race after Dan Wheldon’s death, they named a straightaway after him.

When Helio Castroneves won that 2012 race, he ran to the fence to honor one of the greatest to ever do it.

Nine years later, Helio stood on the Yard of Bricks at the Indianapolis 500 after his record-tying fourth win… talking with Dan’s two sons.

Now Sebastian and Oliver are racers themselves.

Legacy isn’t just remembered.
It keeps racing forward.

author: f1

caption:
Melbourne’s Albert Park has renamed Turn 6 to “In Her Corner” for the 2026 Australian Grand Prix 🇦🇺

The corner will honour Laura Mueller, the first female race engineer in Formula 1 history, and Hannah Schmitz, Red Bull’s Principal Strategy Engineer who has played a huge role in Max Verstappen’s success.

The tribute is part of the “In Her Corner” initiative and will take place during the Australian Grand Prix weekend, which falls on International Women’s Day (March 8).

It’s a way to celebrate women in Formula 1 and inspire more girls to pursue careers in engineering and STEM. 💙

#f1 #formula1 #redbullracing #australiangp #haasf1

#🇯🇵Japan is turning footsteps into electricity!
